title: RCCL Test Runner Configuration
description: Schema for RCCL test runner JSON configuration files

paths.description: Filesystem paths used by the runner. Values support ${VAR}, $VAR, and ${VAR:-default} expansion.

test_binary_dir.description: Directory containing test binaries; overrides the default build_dir/test/

env_variables.description: Global environment variables applied to every test run

auto_detect_hosts.description: When true, auto-detect MPI hosts from SLURM_NODELIST or similar

mpi_args.description: Per-system-profile extra mpirun arguments (keyed by profile name, e.g. 'mellanox', 'ainic', 'thor2')

system_env_variables.description: Per-system-profile environment variable overrides (keyed by profile name)

build_configuration.description: Controls how librccl.so and test binaries are built via install.sh

cmake_options.description: Additional CMake options. Either a string ('-DFOO=BAR -DBAZ=1') or an object whose keys become -DKEY=VAL entries.

env_variables.description: Environment variables set only during the build step

parallel_jobs.description: Number of parallel compile jobs passed to install.sh via -j

test_configurations.description: Named test configuration blocks. Each key is a configuration name referenced by test_suites or via 'extends'.

test_suites.description: Ordered list of test suites to execute

env_variables_map.description: Key/value pairs of environment variables. Values are always strings (use '' to unset).

test_defaults.description: Fields that can appear at the test_configuration level as defaults and be overridden per-test

is_gtest.description: True → GTest binary using --gtest_filter; false → plain executable with direct args. Default: true.

binary.description: Test binary name or path. Relative names are resolved under build_dir/test/ (or test_binary_dir if set). Supports ~ and $VAR expansion.

num_ranks.description: Total MPI ranks. 1 → no mpirun wrapper.

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes across which ranks are distributed

num_gpus.description: GPUs per node; controls --map-by ppr:{num_gpus}:node for multi-node runs. Default: 8.

test_configuration.description: A named test configuration. May extend another configuration and define a list of tests.

extends.description: Name (or list of names) of parent configuration(s) to inherit from

env_variables.description: Environment variables applied to every test in this configuration (merged on top of global env_variables)

rerun_env_variables.description: Additional environment variables merged in when a failed test is rerun (requires --rerun-failed)

args.description: Extra command-line arguments appended to the test binary invocation. Lists are de-duplicated and appended when configs are merged via 'extends'.

mpi_args.description: Extra mpirun arguments for tests in this configuration. Lists are de-duplicated and appended when configs are merged via 'extends'.

_comment.description: Informal annotation for this configuration block (not interpreted by the runner)

tests.description: Individual test cases belonging to this configuration

test_item.description: A single test case within a test_configuration

name.description: Unique test identifier used for --test-name filtering (supports glob patterns)

description.description: Human-readable description shown in output and logs

test_binary_dir.description: Per-test override of the directory in which binary is looked up

test_filter.description: For GTest binaries: passed as --gtest_filter=<value>. For non-GTest: passed as a plain argument.

command_args.description: Additional command-line arguments appended after the binary (and after test_filter for non-GTest)

env_variables.description: Test-specific environment variables (highest priority, merged on top of all other levels)

rerun_env_variables.description: Per-test additional environment variables used only on rerun

test_suite.description: A suite entry that binds a test_configuration to a named run with optional overrides

name.description: Human-readable suite name used for --suite-name filtering

description.description: Optional longer description of what this suite exercises

config.description: Name of the test_configuration to use for this suite

enabled.description: When false the suite is skipped unless targeted by --suite-name. Default: true.

env_variables.description: Suite-level environment variable overrides (between configuration-level and test-level in priority)
